text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, Hello... what does the Grand<n>Concert mean to
you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I want you to answer not as a runner,<n>but as a fan.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...You were a fan, weren't you? You<n>wanted to
see that special someone<n>on stage.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: What does the Grand Concertmean to the fans?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzt, bzzt!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Hello? This is Light Hello.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Is this the place?

text_block_list.name: Woman in Suit
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's her! Hey, so when are you<n>guys doing the
Grand Concert?

text_block_list.name: Man with Hat
text_block_list.text:
I always enjoy the concerts you<n>guys put on here.
Is there anything I<n>can do to help?

text_block_list.name: Elderly Woman
text_block_list.text:
If you have any posters, I'd be glad<n>to put them
up in my store...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Do you know them?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Fans?

text_block_list.name: Fan in Dress
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a concert where anyone can<n>perform,
right? I'm hoping I might get<n>to see my oshi on
stage...

text_block_list.name: Fan with Chef Hat
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to pitch in. Normally, we can't<n>do much
more than just show up and<n>watch.

text_block_list.name: Fan with Glasses
text_block_list.text:
We heard you need supporters? I<n>mean, I know
you're mainly looking<n>for Umamusume, but...

text_block_list.name: Fan with Glasses
text_block_list.text: Is there anything at all we can help<n>out with?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: There's... so many of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fans come up to us one after<n>another.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These concerts were originally meant<n>to attract
more students to our cause,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems word has spread far beyond<n>the
academy gates.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Could we go back to doing these<n>concerts? I think
the folks here would<n>appreciate it too.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...Great!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I have a request for all of you going<n>forward.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I'd like to change up the format a<n>little.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What about it?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...I want to let fans be more vocal<n>during the
performance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hrmm?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure things will get noisier than<n>before, and
you might have a little<n>trouble hearing.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
But I've already notified the fans, our<n>audio
engineer, and city hall about<n>that.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
So please... I want you to listen to<n>your fans'
voices.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Understood.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It'd be amazing if you made the<n>Grand Concert
happen!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Every fan wants to see their favorite<n>runner stand
center stage in a<n>winning concert—it's what we
live for.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
But the feelings we want to convey to<n>them go
beyond just<n>"congratulations."

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...Of course. We had so many more<n>feelings than
that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon enough, the concert begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Smart Falcon and the others go<n>out on
stage...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
L-O-V-E, lovely! Falco is every fan's<n>dream! Falco
is the number one<n>Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I love how you shine brighter than<n>anyone! I love
love looove youuu!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon, you're my idol! No matter<n>what, you stay
strong and beautiful,<n>and never give in! You're
everything I<n>dreamed of!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon, my beloved! Take me with<n>you into the
unknown! No, let me<n>watch over you on your way
there!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: Suzukaaa! Thanks for letting us see<n>you again!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: That's all the happiness we need!

text_block_list.name: Fan E
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Thank you so much, all of<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You guys...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa, what's wrong, Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I don't know. I don't know, but<n>perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I am feeling... "happy."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure there's lots we want to tell<n>each other
today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...So let's sing together.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I want to bring the Grand<n>Concert
back—I'm more sure of that<n>than ever.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I want to say a big thank you to the<n>girls, from us...
and from the fans.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
So I'm going back to the drawing<n>board with our
project.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
This time, it'll be a concert not just<n>for the
Umamusume, but for their fans<n>as well.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: They're at it again... Why can't they<n>understand?

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text: Are you... not going to sing?

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: Wait, you're...
